profile: Cloud and DevOps Engineer with over 7 years of experience designing, deploying, and managing high-availability infrastructure for enterprise SaaS and AI-powered platforms. Managed cloud environments across AWS, GCP, and Azure with strong uptime SLAs. Reduced cloud infrastructure costs by 35% through right-sizing, spot instance strategies, and automated scaling policies. Built CI/CD pipelines that decreased deployment cycles from days to under 30 minutes, enabling frequent production releases across microservice architectures. Orchestrated containerized workloads on Kubernetes with zero-downtime rolling deployments. Implemented monitoring and alerting stacks using Datadog, Grafana, and Prometheus that significantly improved mean time to detection and resolution.

projects.name: Dubio.ai – AI Dubbing & Voice Cloning
projects.description: Dubbing platform that detects speakers, clones each voice, translates dialogue, and outputs dubbed video in another language.
features: Designed and deployed the AWS infrastructure for scalable media processing with auto-scaling compute clusters
Built CI/CD pipelines for continuous deployment of ML model services and API microservices
Implemented container orchestration for voice cloning and translation workloads using Docker and ECS
Set up monitoring and alerting for processing pipeline health, latency, and error tracking

projects.name: Outbound Voice Agents – Lead Calling System
projects.description: Automated outbound calling system that dials leads from CSV uploads, follows scripted flows, and logs call outcomes in a dashboard.
features: Provisioned and managed Twilio infrastructure for VoIP services with high-availability configuration
Designed the deployment architecture for the calling pipeline with queue-based workload distribution
Implemented infrastructure monitoring for call success rates, latency, and system health metrics
Built automated scaling policies for handling variable call volumes during peak campaign periods

projects.name: Sports Commentary – Real-Time Multilingual Commentary
projects.description: Live sports commentary system that transcribes, translates, and streams audio in multiple languages in real time.
features: Architected the low-latency streaming infrastructure for real-time audio processing across regions
Deployed containerized microservices for speech-to-text and text-to-speech with horizontal scaling
Implemented CDN and edge caching strategies for global audio stream distribution
Set up real-time monitoring dashboards for stream health, latency, and concurrent listener metrics
